headline: Esencia de Santa Fe Celebrates Successful Grand Opening and Welcomes Future Homeowners
summary: SANTA FE, NM / ACCESS Newswire / July 1, 2026 / There was great enthusiasm surrounding the grand opening of Esencia de Santa Fe, where Price Land and Development Group, alongside homebuilders Pulte Homes and D.R. Horton, welcomed prospective homebuyers, ...

headline: Americans Still Can't Afford to Buy — and Homebuilder Stocks Are Paying the Price
summary: Homebuilder shares underperformed in H1 2026 as BofA highlighted affordability challenges, elevated housing inventory, rising construction costs.
